title: SkillContractSchema
description: JSON Schema defining canonical structure for the Portable Agent Protocol (PAP) skill contract YAML front matter.

description.description: Clear and detailed purpose/description of what the skill does.

version.description: Semantic version of the skill contract (e.g., '1.0.0').

description.description: Details about the argument's usage and constraints.

success.description: Success return format or structure details.

error.description: Error return format or structure details.

safety_notes.description: Safety guidelines, boundaries, and authorization rules.

author.description: Author or generator of the contract.
